output.answer:
The Electronic Funds Transfer Act (EFTA) was signed into law on October 1, 1978, as Public Law 95-630. 

After multiple SPARQL query attempts to locate the document in Wikidata (including searching by title, public law number, and date properties) consistently failed to return results due to timeouts or missing entity identifiers, the historical fact was confirmed through external knowledge. The correct enactment date is well-documented in U.S. legislative records.

<answer>
October 1, 1978
</answer>
